patterns.name: Nifty Opening Gap Fill
patterns.description: Nifty often fills opening gaps within first hour
patterns.action: Fade the gap with stop at day high/low

patterns.name: Bank Nifty ITF Pattern
patterns.description: Intraday trend following for Bank Nifty
patterns.action: Buy with trailing stop at previous candle low

patterns.name: FII Dumps buying
patterns.description: FII buying > ₹1000Cr often leads to continued rally
patterns.action: Continue long with stop at day low

patterns.name: IT Sector Outperformance
patterns.description: When INR weakens > 0.5%, IT stocks rally

patterns.name: Banking Sector Leadership
patterns.description: Banking sector leads during economic growth cycles

patterns.name: Metal Sector Cycle
patterns.description: Metals rally on global commodity price increases

patterns.name: 9:30-10:00 AM Reversal
patterns.description: First 30 min volatility often reverses by 10 AM
patterns.action: Fade the initial move, book by 10 AM

patterns.name: Last Hour Momentum
patterns.description: Institutional buying often happens in last hour
patterns.action: Follow institutional flow in last hour

patterns.name: Expiry Week Effect
patterns.description: Short covering often seen on expiry day

patterns.name: PCR Reversal Signal
patterns.description: When PCR falls below 0.8, reversal signal

patterns.name: RBI Policy Reaction
patterns.description: Markets react sharply to RBI policy announcements
patterns.action: Avoid taking positions 1 hour before and after policy

patterns.name: US Market Lag
patterns.description: Nifty follows Dow Jones with 30-60 min delay
patterns.action: Short on gap down, cover on recovery

patterns.name: Double Bottom on Daily
patterns.description: Strong reversal pattern on daily timeframe
patterns.action: Buy on neckline breakout with stop at second bottom

patterns.name: RSI Divergence
patterns.description: Price making new high but RSI lower = bearish divergence
